query:
INSERT INTO event_role_binding_overrides (series, event, role_binding_id, discord_role_id, min_count, max_count)
               VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
               ON CONFLICT (series, event, role_binding_id)
               DO UPDATE SET
                   discord_role_id = EXCLUDED.discord_role_id,
                   min_count = EXCLUDED.min_count,
                   max_count = EXCLUDED.max_count,
                   updated_at = NOW()
               RETURNING id
